## Linked concern

Closes #

## What changed

<!-- Two or three sentences. The **why**, not a recap of the diff. -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `uv run pre-commit run --all-files` is clean (covers lint, format,
      type check, dead fixtures, markdown)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` — suite passes, coverage does not regress
- [ ] New tests follow `test_should_{expected}_when_{condition}`

## Deferred work

<!-- Any follow-up consciously left for later. Open a tracking issue if it
matters. Write "None" if nothing was deferred. -->

## AI assistance disclosure

<!-- Bureau doctrine: AI-assisted, not vibe-coded. (See CONTRIBUTING.md.) -->

- [ ] I read every line of this diff before opening the PR.
- [ ] I can explain any line a reviewer points at.
- [ ] I understand the tests I added or modified.
